headline: FirstEnergy (FE) Could Be 7% Undervalued As Grid Investment Narrative Builds
summary: FirstEnergy (FE) has drawn investor attention after its recent share performance, with the stock around $48.43 and mixed short term returns that include gains over the past month and declines over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for FirstEnergy. Zooming out, FirstEnergy’s recent share price strength over the past month contrasts with a weaker 90 day share price return, while longer term total shareholder returns over 3 and 5 years have been solid. This suggests momentum has eased...

headline: FirstEnergy: Cheap And With Potential To Grow
summary: FirstEnergy shows rising revenue/EBITDA, a $36B growth plan, attractive valuation, low leverage, and data center tailwinds. Read why FE stock is a buy.
